name: PAX 4 Grip Sleeve
summary: Enhance the comfort and durability of your device with the PAX 4 Silicone Grip Sleeve.
description: Enhance the comfort and durability of your device with the PAX 4 Silicone Grip Sleeve. Designed specifically for the PAX 4 Vaporiser, this premium accessory improves handling while helping protect your device from everyday wear. Product details are provided by the manufacturer and trusted industry sources. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
